commands.review_summary:
This PR narrows the env parameter for `resolveEmbeddedAbortSettleTimeoutMs` to an optional two-key type while preserving the existing `process.env` default and timeout logic.

PR surface: Source +6. Total +6 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: current main exposes the broader `NodeJS.ProcessEnv` parameter while the PR proof reports the generated/test type failure clearing after this narrower optional env shape. I did not rerun checks in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair job is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer merge handling for a protected maintainer PR with sufficient proof.

target.title: fix(agents): loosen abort settle env typing
target.body:
## Summary

- narrow `resolveEmbeddedAbortSettleTimeoutMs` to the two env keys it actually reads
- keep the existing `process.env` default and runtime timeout behavior unchanged
- unblock `check:changed` generated/test type surfaces that reject full `NodeJS.ProcessEnv` as a required-key `Pick`

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/abort-settle-env-final-$USER-$$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-settle-timeout.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- AWS Crabbox `run_1a882b49b2af`, lease `cbx_fdfa7ac4ecbd`, slug `jade-prawn`, provider `aws`: `corepack pnpm check:changed` passed after rebase to `99f70284bf`
- clean ancestry rebase to `21e69fdd4f`, followed by the same focused Vitest, format/lint/diff checks, and autoreview

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `check:changed` failed in generated/test type surfaces because the helper accepted `NodeJS.ProcessEnv`, making the narrowed keys appear required at the boundary.

Real environment tested: focused local Codex worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux runner.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest for the abort settle timeout helper, local format/lint/diff checks, autoreview, and remote `corepack pnpm check:changed`.

Evidence after fix: focused test passed 1 file / 5 tests; autoreview reported no actionable findings; AWS Crabbox `run_1a882b49b2af` exited 0.

Observed result after fix: the prior `ProcessEnv` assignability failure is gone while the helper still reads the same override and `OPENCLAW_TEST_FAST` fallback.

What was not tested: no live provider or runtime session smoke; this is a static env typing repair.
target.author: vincentkoc
